2367850.name: Solene's Spin Story
2367850.description:
"Oh, a shooting star! I wish something would finally happen..."

Solene's Spin Story is a whimsical puzzle-action game where two inseparable celestial friends — Solene and Selene — set off to catch a rogue shooting star… the very one that crashed into and injured Selene.

To help her heal, you’ll guide them through increasingly tricky levels, packed with tight passages, winding paths, and surprising obstacles.

⚠️ Warning:

Selene is wounded. One wrong move, one tiny bump against a wall or obstacle — and it’s all over!
Can you catch the shooting star… and piece Selene back together?

✨ Main Features:

  • 80+ handcrafted levels full of obstacles (and shortcuts… if you’re clever!)

  • A hand-drawn storybook narrative following the journey of Solene & Selene

  • Adventure Mode: 6 vibrant, unique worlds with time trials

  • Challenge Mode: A tough-a-stars mode where you collect every Sun-Sticker under special conditions, like:

    • An extended orbit for Selene

    • A ghostly Solene that passes through walls

    • Multiple moons orbiting you at once

    • And many more surprises!

  • Tight, intuitive controls and short levels designed for quick play sessions

  • A rich original soundtrack, with a different artist composing for each world
